# Series 8 ‚Äî Axiom-Check Log

**The committed record of `#print axioms` over every Series 8 headline. Regenerated by building `Series8.AxiomCheck` (`series-8/formal/Series8/AxiomCheck.lean`). Every headline reduces to Mathlib's standard three ‚Äî `propext`, `Classical.choice`, `Quot.sound` ‚Äî with no `sorry` and no custom axiom.**

*Generated 2026-07-11 from a clean `lake build Series8 Series8.AxiomCheck` (Lean 4 `v4.15.0` / Mathlib `v4.15.0`). A publication should cite the specific commit hash and a clean-build log.*

---

Each theorem below printed exactly `depends on axioms: [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.

## WS1 ‚Äî the no-god's-eye spine (Impossibility proved)
- `Series8.WS1.ws1_no_gods_eye`
- `Series8.WS1.ws1_no_gods_eye_node`
- `Series8.WS1.ws1_hold_forced`
- `Series8.WS1.ws1_symmetric_hold_recoverable`
- `Series8.WS1.ws1_directed_hold_free`

## WS2 ‚Äî perspective breaks the collapse (plurality by free perspective)
- `Series8.WS2.ws2_perspective_breaks_merge`
- `Series8.WS2.ws2_free_not_recoverable`
- `Series8.WS2.ws2_plurality_by_perspective`
- `Series8.WS2.ws2_monism_broken`

- `Series8.WS3.ws3_rerestriction_no_leaf` ‚Äî (NL)
- `Series8.WS3.ws3_rerestriction_not_function` ‚Äî (NF)
- `Series8.WS3.ws3_dynamics_forced`
- `Series8.WS3.ws3_prec_is_reach`
- `Series8.WS3.ws3_imported_index_refuted`

- `Series8.WS4.ws4_depth_forecloses_witness`

- `Series8.WS5.ws5_kill_condition`

## WS7 ‚Äî the audit and the typed verdict
- `Series8.WS7.ws7_audit`
- `Series8.WS7.ws7_verdict`
- `Series8.WS7.ws7_verdict_eq` (`ws7_verdict = perspectiveEstablished`)

- `Series8.WS7.ws7_freeness_not_defined_in`
- `Series8.WS7.ws7_strip_ledger`

---

**Count: 29 headline theorems, all on the standard three.** The build is `sorry`-free and axiom-clean. `scripts/gate.sh` confirms Series 8 imports resolve only to `Series8.*` (+ Mathlib) ‚Äî nothing from `series-7/`, `series-4/`, or `archive/`.
